behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file path, function name getPopoverMiddlewares, and all middleware identifiers (flip, shift, limitShift, padding: 5) that tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and cites floating-ui docs but doesn't explicitly state 'move flip before shift'; agent must reason from the docs reference.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check ordering (flip before shift) and preservation of existing block contents, which matches instruction requirements; any correct fix must satisfy these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run subprocesses for eslint, tsc, prettier, and jest on Popover, in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p ordering test requires the actual reorder, and jest/tsc/eslint/prettier subprocess tests verify real behavior.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover middleware reorder, preservation of shift/flip bodies, lint/typecheck/prettier, and Popover jest tests as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and FAIL-TO-PASS/PASS-TO-PASS labels.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file because scope is given, but does not point to exact line or state the reorder solution directly.
